description: city on boundary of Pottawatomie and Seminole Counties in Oklahoma, USA
description_wiki: Maud is a city on the boundary between Pottawatomie and Seminole Counties in the U.S. state of Oklahoma.

description: city in Seminole County, Oklahoma, United States
description_wiki: Seminole (Meskwaki: Sheminônîheki) is a city in Seminole County, Oklahoma, United States.

description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: president of the United States from 1933 to 1945 (1882–1945)
description_wiki: Franklin Delano Roosevelt (January 30, 1882 – April 12, 1945), also known as FDR, was the 32nd president of the United States, serving from 1933 until his death in 1945.

description: country in Central Europe
description_wiki: Poland, officially the Republic of Poland, is a country in Central Europe.

description: global war originating in Europe, 1914–1918
description_wiki: World War I, or the First World War (28 July 1914 – 11 November 1918), also known as The Great War, was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies (or Entente) and the Central Powers.

description: public research university in Norman, Oklahoma, United States
description_wiki: The University of Oklahoma (OU) is a public research university in Norman, Oklahoma, United States.

description: newspaper in Oklahoma, US
description_wiki: The Seminole Producer is a daily newspaper circulated throughout Seminole County, Oklahoma.

description: largest city of the state of Louisiana, United States
description_wiki: New Orleans (commonly known as NOLA or  The Big Easy, among other nicknames) is a consolidated city-parish located along the Mississippi River in the U.S. state of Louisiana.

description: large canal in Panama
description_wiki: The Panama Canal (Spanish: Canal de Panamá) is an artificial 82-kilometer (51-mile) waterway in Panama that connects the Caribbean Sea with the Pacific Ocean.

description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.

description: island country in East Asia
description_wiki: Japan is an island country in East Asia.

description: United States Army general (1895–1993)
description_wiki: Matthew Bunker Ridgway (3 March 1895 – 26 July 1993) was a senior officer in the United States Army, who served as Supreme Allied Commander Europe (1952–1953) and the 19th Chief of Staff of the United States Army (1953–1955).

description: capital and largest city of Japan
description_wiki: Tokyo, officially the Tokyo Metropolis, is the capital and most populous city of Japan.

description: formation of the United States Army (1920-1968)
description_wiki: The 45th Infantry Division was an infantry division of the United States Army, most associated with the Oklahoma Army National Guard, from 1920 to 1968.

description: city in Seoul Capital Area, South Korea
description_wiki: Incheon is a city located in northwestern South Korea, bordering Seoul and Gyeonggi Province to the east.
